Football: UEFA Conference League - match: AZ Alkmaar - Jagiellonia Białystok
Football: UEFA Conference League - match: KF Shkendija - Jagiellonia Białystok
programme.desc: The Pride of Podlasie started the league phase of the youngest UEFA competition with a modest victory over Hamrun Spartans 1-0.In the second round, Adrian Siemieniec's players faced the strong RC Strasbourg, drawing with them away 1-1.Now they are on a delegation to Skopje.KF Shkendija has a 0-2 defeat against Rayo Vallecano and a 1-0 victory over Shelbourne FC.Jagiellonia will be the favorite in the match at the stadium.Todor Proeski.Let's hope it plays its role better than the Lech Poznań players in the confrontation with Lincoln Red Imps from Gibraltar.

programme.title: Football: UEFA Conference League - second leg play-off match: ACF Fiorentina - Jagiellonia Białystok
Tennis: ATP Tournament in Miami - singles quarterfinal match
programme.desc: There are eight players left competing for the Miami Open champion title.Each of them has already secured PLN 193.6 thousand.dollars.Jakub Mensik, who was the best in the tournament in Florida last year, is missing from the quarterfinalists.The Czech was eliminated in the third round after losing to Frances Tiafoe.The American will fight the ATP ranking runner-up, Jannik Sinner, to advance to the top four.The remaining pairs are: the sensation of the competition, Martin Landaluce and Jiri Lehecka, Tommy Paul and Arthur Fils, and Francisco Cerundolo and Alexander Zverev.

programme.desc: The program will include highlights of the recently played matches in the qualifications for the World Cup, which will take place in 2026 in Canada, Mexico and the USA.Fans will learn about the current situation in the groups.

programme.title: Football: UEFA Conference League - second leg play-off match: Lech Poznań - KuPS Kuopio
Football: UEFA Conference League - match: FC Noah - Legia Warszawa
Football: UEFA Conference League - match: Omonia FC - Raków Częstochowa
programme.desc: The Medals are one of three teams in the Conference League that have not yet been defeated in the regular round.The Częstochowa team has already secured their place in the knockout phase, but they do not intend to be satisfied with that.They are counting on direct promotion to the 1/8 finals, which will give them a place in the best eight at the end of the league phase.Before the clash with Omonia, coached by former Legia coach Henning Berg, they are in third place in the table.The team from Nicosia is fifteenth and has eight points, three less than Raków.

programme.title: Football: UEFA Europa League - match: Aston Villa FC - FC Salzburg
programme.desc: The hosts are impressive in their form both domestically and in European cups.In the current edition of the Europa League, they lost only once - to Go Ahead Eagles (1-2), but since then they have won four in a row, including the last one over Fenerbahce (1-0).Aston Villa is already certain of promotion, taking second place in the table.The situation of the Austrians is definitely more difficult.RB Salzburg managed to win only two games and lost five.They are in a distant 28th place in the classification, and in order to advance to the play-off phase of the 1/16 finals, they must win in Birmingham and count on their rivals' mistakes.

Football: UEFA Conference League - match: KF Shkendija - Jagiellonia Białystok
programme.desc: The Pride of Podlasie started the league phase of the youngest UEFA competition with a modest victory over Hamrun Spartans 1-0.In the second round, Adrian Siemieniec's players faced the strong RC Strasbourg, drawing with them away 1-1.Now they are on a delegation to Skopje.KF Shkendija has a 0-2 defeat against Rayo Vallecano and a 1-0 victory over Shelbourne FC.Jagiellonia will be the favorite in the match at the stadium.Todor Proeski.Let's hope it plays its role better than the Lech Poznań players in the confrontation with Lincoln Red Imps from Gibraltar.

programme.title: Football: UEFA Conference League - second leg play-off match: ACF Fiorentina - Jagiellonia Białystok
Football: UEFA Conference League - match: Rayo Vallecano - Lech Poznań
Football: UEFA Conference League - match: Omonia FC - Raków Częstochowa
programme.desc: The Medals are one of three teams in the Conference League that have not yet been defeated in the regular round.The Częstochowa team has already secured their place in the knockout phase, but they do not intend to be satisfied with that.They are counting on direct promotion to the 1/8 finals, which will give them a place in the best eight at the end of the league phase.Before the clash with Omonia, coached by former Legia coach Henning Berg, they are in third place in the table.The team from Nicosia is fifteenth and has eight points, three less than Raków.

Tennis: ATP Tournament in Miami - singles quarterfinal match
programme.desc: There are eight players left competing for the Miami Open champion title.Each of them has already secured PLN 193.6 thousand.dollars.Jakub Mensik, who was the best in the tournament in Florida last year, is missing from the quarterfinalists.The Czech was eliminated in the third round after losing to Frances Tiafoe.The American will fight the ATP ranking runner-up, Jannik Sinner, to advance to the top four.The remaining pairs are: the sensation of the competition, Martin Landaluce and Jiri Lehecka, Tommy Paul and Arthur Fils, and Francisco Cerundolo and Alexander Zverev.

programme.title: Tennis: ATP Tournament in Miami - singles quarterfinal match
programme.desc: There are eight players left competing for the Miami Open champion title.Each of them has already secured PLN 193.6 thousand.dollars.Jakub Mensik, who was the best in the tournament in Florida last year, is missing from the quarterfinalists.The Czech was eliminated in the third round after losing to Frances Tiafoe.The American will fight the ATP ranking runner-up, Jannik Sinner, to advance to the top four.The remaining pairs are: the sensation of the competition, Martin Landaluce and Jiri Lehecka, Tommy Paul and Arthur Fils, and Francisco Cerundolo and Alexander Zverev.

Combat sports: UFC 315 - fight: Belal Muhammad - Jack Della Maddalena 11/05/2025
programme.desc: We will see two title fights at the Bell Center in Montreal.First, Valentina Shevchenko will enter the octagon to defend her flyweight belt for the tenth time.The contender for the title is Manon Fiorot from France.The main course will be the fight between Belal Muhammad and Jacek Della Maddalena.The popular Remember the Name won the welterweight championship on June 24, 2024, defeating Leon Edwards on points.The belt will be tried by Della Maddalena from Australia, who has won seventeen fights in a row, including seven under the UFC banner.

Ninja vs. Ninja
programme.desc: The new season of the program promises competition at the highest level.However, the age of participants is lowering - even sixteen-year-olds will take part in this edition.They want to prove that experience does not necessarily always trump youthful zeal and enthusiasm.The Poland versus the rest of the world formula was restored to the program.In this edition, Jan Tatarowicz has a chance to take away the title of best ninja from the previous season from Clément Gravier.The program will also feature runner-up Samuel Folsom and Isabella Folsom - winner of the Last Woman Standing title.These athletes are among the world's best today.Polish players will be supported by experienced leaders and coaches, including:Paweł Murawski, Krzysztof Orankiewicz, Grzegorz Matyszewski and Grzegorz Niecko.Special guests are also expected to participate, such as Piotr Żyła and Bartek Wrona.

Boxing: Polsat Boxing Promotions 10 in Łódź - super middleweight: Osleys Iglesias - Ezequiel Maderna 24/09/2022
programme.desc: El Tornado de Cuba, Osleys Iglesias tied his fate with Poland.Since December 2021, he has appeared in galas organized by Polsat Boxing Promotions three times and emerged victorious three times.The talented Cuban's opponent will be a very experienced boxer from Argentina.35-year-old Ezequiel Maderna has 35 professional fights, 27 of which he won.Recently, however, he has not had a good streak and has suffered three defeats in a row.In March 2022, he was defeated by, among others, Paweł Stępień.
